name: Safe synthetic playbook: Impossible-travel login signal
description: Lab metadata for geographically inconsistent authentications on a test identity. No real travel data, no live IP geolocation API required; timestamps and regions are fixtures.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: Fixture login event labeled LAB-GEO-A (region A).
Second fixture login LAB-GEO-B flagged as incompatible with plausible travel velocity (synthetic).
IdP rule simulation elevates severity and requests adaptive step-up (fixture only).

payload.title: LAB: Suspicious login pattern (impossible travel, synthetic)

events_emitted.headline: Risk engine impossible-travel heuristic
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Two regional fixtures within a timeframe that violates policy thresholds in the lab profile.

events_emitted.headline: Finding for identity anomaly
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Normalized synthetic finding ties the alert to a user principal for remediation planning.

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: High-severity identity alert requires SOC queue simulation.
Access policies and conditional access mappings are evaluated against the synthetic risk score.

expected_remediation.summary: Simulated session revocation offer, forced re-auth, and identity review ticket; live revocation only after human gate in production templates.

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Write high-priority evaluation artifact and tag incident (stub).
Notify user of suspicious sign-in via lab notification channel (no real SMS/email unless enabled).

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: Operator chooses whether to revoke all sessions for the principal or only the flagged session.
Account lock impacts availability; humans confirm blast radius.

expected_final_report.title: Impossible travel — synthetic playbook outcome
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: Two fixture logins violated lab travel velocity rules; playbook expects identity containment options to be modeled, not blindly executed.
